meaning: n.美食法,烹饪法,享乐主义
examples: Burgundy has always been considered a major centre of gastronomy.
Most of the British public is familiar even with Heston Blumentha's molecular gastronomy.
And now, most of the British public is familiar even with Heston Blumentha's molecular gastronomy.
Two decades later, I am convinced we've left the hair-shirt brand of vegetarian gastronomy behind.
Serious foodies are discovering The Tasting Room , a tiny East Village haven of gastronomy.
